layoutRegions.name: freeze-hero
layoutRegions.purpose: Summarize approved-but-frozen archive purge execution posture and expose the thaw packet action.

layoutRegions.name: freeze-grid
layoutRegions.purpose: Compare frozen purge executions, reconciliation packet locks, legal re-freezes, and delegated pause acknowledgements.

layoutRegions.name: thaw-panels
layoutRegions.purpose: Inspect retry hash freeze proofs, checksum acceptance freezes, and rollback-safe thaw packet exhibits.

components.name: FreezeCard
components.purpose: Approved-but-frozen purge execution summary with packet lock, pause acknowledgement, and thaw readiness.
interactions: status chip highlights frozen, thaw ready, or review state
progress bar communicates thaw readiness without layout shift

components.name: EvidenceRow
components.purpose: Dense row for reconciliation locks, legal hold re-freezes, owner pause acknowledgements, and checksum freezes.
interactions: state label remains visible at narrow widths
row content stacks cleanly on mobile

components.name: ThawPacket
components.purpose: Rollback-safe command and exhibit checklist for resuming a frozen purge execution.
interactions: packet fields preserve long command text without overlapping neighboring panels
checklist remains readable on mobile and desktop

acceptanceChecks: Generated app imports src/omarchy-theme.css before app styles.
Every visible color comes from a --omarchy-* CSS variable or color-mix using one.
Every button, row, input, and command item has a visible :focus-visible state.
Layout remains stable at 320px, 768px, and 1280px viewport widths.
Primary content is usable on first load without a marketing interstitial.
A .desktop launcher can be generated with omarchy-native app desktop.
An opt-in theme sync hook can be generated with omarchy-native app hook.
